skipped.reason: Navigation design deferred per UX brief. NavSpineClient remains as bare skeleton.

global_implementations.description: scroll-behavior: smooth on html with prefers-reduced-motion: reduce reset to auto
Visually-hidden skip link as first focusable element, pointing to #main-content
lg:pr-14 on body for nav spine clearance
Fixed back-to-top button with scroll threshold (~100vh), bottom-left desktop, bottom-right mobile, aria-label, fade in/out

All interactive elements verified: Button base cva includes focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2. Dark section offsets use focus-visible:ring-offset-secondary-950. Footer links, nav links, FloorPlanTabs, StructuralLayerToggles, CollapsibleDetailCard toggle all have explicit focus rings.

section_implementations.description: No additional work needed. CTA anchor covered by global smooth scroll.
Reduced-motion fallback: static photo placeholder with role=img and descriptive aria-label
Reduced-motion fallback: static interior photo placeholder with role=img and descriptive aria-label
FloorPlanTabs client component: segmented control with radiogroup role, aria-checked, focus rings, aria-live plan area
Reduced-motion fallback (ordered structural component list), contextual link to Component Details section
Step progress indicator with 7-segment pip bar, Step N of M text in aria-live polite region, hidden under reduced motion. Reduced-motion fallback: numbered step list with descriptions.
StructuralLayerToggles client component: layer visibility toggle buttons with aria-pressed, pip-coloured indicators, focus rings
CollapsibleDetailCard client component: mobile collapsible cards with aria-expanded, chevron indicator, keyboard toggle, desktop always-expanded
External link has target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, sr-only (opens in new tab). Email uses mailto: href. All links have focus-visible ring styles with dark section offset.

UX-G0.notes: All brief decisions implemented or documented. Hero, exterior-views, interior-lifestyle, floor-plans, technology-divider, construction-overview, assembly-sequence, structural-floor-plans, component-details, footer — all covered.

UX-G1.notes: 4 client boundary files: BackToTopButton (scroll listener + useState), FloorPlanTabs (useState), StructuralLayerToggles (useState), CollapsibleDetailCard (useState + useMediaQuery). NavSpineClient skipped per brief. All justified.

UX-G2.notes: ARIA verified: aria-expanded on CollapsibleDetailCard, aria-pressed on StructuralLayerToggles, aria-checked + radiogroup on FloorPlanTabs, aria-live=polite on plan areas and step indicator, aria-label on back-to-top button and skip link, sr-only on external link disclosure.

UX-G3.notes: BackToTopButton 44x44px (size-11). FloorPlanTabs buttons have py-3 px-6 (adequate). StructuralLayerToggles have py-2.5 px-4 (24px height, adequate touch target via full button area). CollapsibleDetailCard toggle is full-width.

UX-G4.notes: pnpm build clean — zero errors, zero type errors.
